sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: AXIA Energia (AXIA) hits 98% code adherence and joins B3 Novo Mercado
feed.summary: AXIA Energia S.A. announced that it achieved over 98% adherence to the Brazilian Corporate Governance Code and completed its migration to B3's Novo Mercado segment in June 2026, adopting a "one share, one vote" principle while retaining the Brazilian Federal Government's golden share. Key governance practices highlighted include a Board of Directors with 70% independent members, stringent bylaw eligibility rules for officers, annual evaluations, and a robust Compliance Program and Whistleblower Channel. The company's 2026 Governance Report reaffirms its commitment to strengthening corporate governance for sustainable value creation.

feed.title: AtriCure 2Q Net $8.96M >ATRC
feed.summary: This article states that AtriCure's second quarter net income was $8.96 million. The article headline seems to be the entire content provided.

feed.title: BancFirst: Q2 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: The article provides a brief snapshot of BancFirst's (BANF) Q2 earnings. It reports an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.39 for the quarter, which did not meet the consensus estimate of $1.43. Additionally, the bank's revenue for the quarter was $163.60 million.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT Inc (ARR) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Economic Return Amid ...
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT Inc (ARR) reported a strong Q2 2026 with a total economic return of 4.8% and GAAP net income of $111.5 million. The company grew its asset portfolio to over $22 billion and maintained stable dividends. Challenges include macroeconomic uncertainties, a flatter yield curve, and potential risks from inflation.

feed.title: AmeriServ Financial (NASDAQ: ASRV) details earnings, capital and union-focused strategy
feed.summary: AmeriServ Financial (NASDAQ: ASRV) has released an investor update detailing its financial performance, capital strength, and a strategic focus on unions. The bank reported a $1.46 billion community bank franchise with strong deposit growth, improving net interest margins, and solid asset quality with non-performing loans at 0.76%. AmeriServ also highlighted its profitable wealth management division with $2.8 billion in client assets and a capital plan that includes a quarterly dividend of $0.03 per share and potential share repurchases in the latter half of 2026, alongside a stock price increase of 43% since the prior annual meeting.

feed.title: agilon health, inc. Stock 12‑Month Price Target Raised to $73.36, Implies 39% Downside
feed.summary: agilon health, inc. (AGL) stock's average 12-month price target has been increased to $73.36 by 14 analysts, up from $71.57, though this still implies a 39% potential downside based on the July 22nd closing price. The consensus analyst rating remains "Hold" across 17 analysts, with a breakdown of 4 Buys, 10 Holds, and 3 Sells.

feed.title: Is Avino (TSX:ASM) Revealing a Strategic Shift Through Its Changing Silver-Gold Production Mix?
feed.summary: Avino Silver & Gold Mines Ltd. reported lower copper and silver output but slightly higher gold production in Q2 2026 compared to the previous year, raising questions about its long-term operational profile. This weaker silver-equivalent production puts more focus on execution risk but doesn't alter the key short-term catalyst of efficiently running existing operations. The company's future performance will be closely watched against its 2026 production and cost guidance.

feed.title: AtriCure Inc (ATRC) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Revenue Growth and Profitability ...
feed.summary: AtriCure Inc (ATRC) reported strong Q2 2026 results with worldwide revenue growing 13% year-over-year to $154 million and a net income of $9 million. The company achieved significant profitability improvements with an adjusted EBITDA over $27 million and raised its full-year adjusted EBITDA outlook. Despite challenges in the minimally invasive ablation business and slower international growth, AtriCure remains confident due to strong product performance, clinical trial progress, and strategic market positioning.

feed.title: VeriSign Inc (VRSN) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Domain Registrations and Strong ...
feed.summary: VeriSign Inc (VRSN) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings with a 6% revenue increase and 7.7% EPS growth, driven by a record 12.7 million new domain registrations. The company also announced an increase in its share repurchase program to $1.5 billion and discussed the strategic potential of the new .web domain, despite a slight decline in the renewal rate. AI is identified as a key driver for domain growth, enhancing demand and making it easier for businesses to create content.

feed.title: Newmont Corp (NEM) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Free Cash Flow and Strategic ...
feed.summary: Newmont Corp (NEM) reported a strong Q2 2026, achieving record free cash flow of $2.2 billion and returning $1.9 billion to shareholders. Despite facing cost pressures from rising oil prices and inflation impacting project costs, the company secured regulatory approvals for the Red Chris Block Cave project and maintained a robust net cash position of $3.4 billion. Newmont is focused on optimizing operations and capital-efficient growth strategies to meet future production targets.

feed.title: Deckers Outdoor Corp (DECK) Q1 2027 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic ...
feed.summary: Deckers Outdoor Corp (DECK) achieved record Q1 2027 revenue of $1.02 billion, a 5.7% increase year-over-year, driven by strong performance in its HOKA and UGG brands and significant direct-to-consumer growth. The gross margin improved to 56.4%, though the company noted concerns about increased SG&A expenses, geopolitical conflicts, and higher tariff rates. Despite these challenges, Deckers Outdoor Corp provided a positive fiscal year 2027 outlook, expecting high single-digit revenue growth and an improved gross margin.

feed.title: Associated Banc-Corp (ASB) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong Loan Growth and Strategic ...
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp (ASB) announced strong Q2 2026 earnings, featuring a 15% total loan growth, including the American National acquisition, and 3% organic loan growth. The company achieved its target for organic C&I loan growth and saw a 6% increase in organic core customer deposits. Despite positive financial performance, ASB noted an increase in noninterest expenses due to acquisition costs, higher nonaccrual balances, and criticized loans.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust Inc (DLR) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Growth and Strategic ...
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust Inc (DLR) reported exceptional Q2 2026 earnings, with core FFO growing 14% year-over-year to $2.13 per share and record bookings exceeding $100 million. The company achieved a new record total backlog of $1.9 billion and raised its core FFO guidance for 2026 to $8.15 to $8.20 per share, driven by strong growth pillars and an expanded development pipeline. Despite potential risks like episodic hyperscale leasing and regulatory challenges, DLR anticipates continued double-digit FFO growth extending into 2027 and beyond.

feed.title: The Bull Case For Stryker (SYK) Could Change Following Mako RPS Handheld Knee Robotics Launch - Learn Why
feed.summary: Stryker recently launched its Mako RPS Handheld Knee Robotics system in the US, expanding its Mako ecosystem for total knee replacements. This new system, designed for wider adoption across surgeons and care settings, is a positive development for Stryker's investment narrative, reinforcing its focus on innovation in orthopaedic robotics. The company's future growth hinges on effectively translating product breadth into sustained revenue while managing challenges like supply chain disruptions and regulatory pressures.

feed.title: What TE Connectivity (TEL)'s Record Orders and Raised Outlook Mean For Shareholders
feed.summary: TE Connectivity reported strong Q3 2026 results with record sales and net income, driven by robust orders and a raised full-year outlook. The company's business is being reshaped by AI infrastructure, electrification, and industrial power demand, further supported by the planned acquisition of Astrodyne TDI. This performance reinforces the investment thesis focusing on AI data centers and electrification as key growth drivers for TE Connectivity.

feed.title: AAAC Dividend: 5.25% Yield, $0.53/Share — History & Dates
feed.summary: The article details the dividend information for Columbia AAA CLO ETF (AAAC), which offers a 5.25% dividend yield, equating to $0.53 per share annually. It provides a complete history of its 7 dividend payments since 2025, including ex-dividend dates, amount per share, and pay dates. The ETF has a 0% 5-year dividend growth rate and a 0 payout ratio, indicating dividends might not be growing but are safely covered by earnings.

feed.title: Adaptive Biotechnologies CSO Harlan Robins sells $10.78m in stock
feed.summary: Harlan S. Robins, CSO of Adaptive Biotechnologies Corp, sold approximately $10.78 million worth of company stock on July 21, 2026, after exercising stock options. These transactions were executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following the sales, Robins beneficially owns 812,058 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Arcosa, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results on August 5, 2026
feed.summary: Arcosa, Inc. announced it would release its second quarter 2026 results on August 5, 2026, after market close. Due to a pending acquisition by CRH for $150 per share, Arcosa will not hold a conference call or provide a financial outlook. The company is a provider of infrastructure-related products and solutions.

feed.title: AMC Entertainment (NYSE: AMC) seeks board, rights and equity plan changes
feed.summary: AMC Entertainment is proposing several significant governance and compensation changes for approval at its 2026 annual meeting on September 24, 2026. Key proposals include declassifying the board, enhancing stockholder rights by allowing written consent and special meetings (at a 20% ownership threshold), and increasing the 2024 Equity Incentive Plan share pool from 25 million to 50 million shares to support equity-based compensation and avoid substantial cash settlements for awards. The company emphasizes that these changes aim to improve director accountability, stockholder influence, and the sustainability of its compensation structure, especially given industry volatility.

feed.title: Zoom Video Communications, Inc. Class A (1ZM) Q4 2025 Earnings Report - Results, Call & Slides
feed.summary: Zoom Video Communications (1ZM) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, exceeding both EPS and revenue expectations. The company posted an actual EPS of €1.23 against a consensus of €1.14 and actual revenue of €1.04 billion, beating the expected €1.03 billion. Zoom also provided details on its upcoming earnings announcements and a history of past performance.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NEM) Q2 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation reported strong Q2 2026 results, remaining on track for full-year guidance with 1.3 million ounces of gold production and $2.2 billion in free cash flow. The company announced new executive leadership appointments and discussed ongoing projects like Red Chris, Cadia, and Lihir. Management addressed cost pressures, particularly from oil prices, and reiterated commitment to its capital allocation framework and shareholder returns.

feed.title: Hormel's Protein-Focused Portfolio Should Appeal to Consumers Despite Near-Term Inflation Headwinds
feed.summary: Hormel Foods, known for its strong presence in US shelves with popular meat-centric brands, has strategically expanded its portfolio to include non-meat protein brands and diversified into ethnic and emerging food markets through acquisitions. Despite this protein-focused strategy making it vulnerable to input cost inflation, its strong brand recognition and diversification are expected to appeal to consumers. The company has also reduced its exposure to commodity turkey to mitigate volatility.

feed.title: Amprius Technologies Inc Thailand Depositary Receipts Repr 1 Sh Financial Statements – SET:AMPX03
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for Amprius Technologies Inc. Thailand Depositary Receipts (SET:AMPX03) on TradingView. It covers key facts, valuation metrics, and growth and profitability details. The company, founded in 2008, develops lithium-ion batteries and has not paid dividends to date.

feed.title: Associated Banc-Corp earnings beat by $0.01, revenue topped estimates
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp (NYSE: ASB) reported second-quarter earnings per share of $0.73, exceeding analyst estimates by $0.01. The company's revenue for the quarter was $450.44 million, also surpassing the consensus estimate of $438.01 million. Following the report, the stock closed at $30.26, showing a 10.64% increase over three months and a 19.75% increase over 12 months.

feed.title: Citigroup Prices Autocallable Medium-Term Notes Linked to Eaton Corporation Stock with Conditional 11.55% Annual Coupons
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. has priced autocallable medium-term notes linked to Eaton Corporation plc, maturing on September 10, 2027. These notes offer contingent annual coupons of 11.55% but carry substantial principal loss risk if Eaton stock falls below a 60% barrier. This offering exemplifies Citigroup's structured product strategy to provide high-yield instruments for investors willing to accept equity-linked exposure and autocall features.

feed.title: Paramount Skydance Director John L. Thornton Receives 25,000 Class B Shares via RSU Vesting on July 21, 2026
feed.summary: John L. Thornton, a director at Paramount Skydance Corp (NASDAQ: PSKY), has acquired 25,000 Class B common shares through the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) on July 21, 2026. The transaction was valued at $8.53 per share, and Thornton holds additional RSUs set to vest by July 21, 2027, further increasing his potential equity in the company.

feed.title: Sean Leary to Move From Ally Investor Relations to Auto Servicing
feed.summary: Ally Financial (NYSE: ALLY) announced leadership changes, moving Sean Leary from Chief Financial Planning and Investor Relations Officer to Head of Consumer Servicing Operations for the Auto Finance business. Dan Ignacio, Executive Director of Investor Relations & Corporate FP&A, will take over Leary's previous investor relations responsibilities, reporting to CFO Russ Hutchinson. Leary will transition to his new role over the coming weeks, bringing his extensive financial and leadership experience to the auto finance sector.

feed.title: Amkor inks $1.5B deal with Nvidia to expand Arizona chip packaging capacity
feed.summary: Nvidia has entered into a multiyear strategic agreement with Amkor, providing a $1.5 billion prepayment to support Amkor's expansion of U.S. advanced chip packaging capacity. This deal is part of Amkor's ongoing $7 billion project in the Peoria Innovation Core, aiming to boost semiconductor manufacturing in Arizona.

feed.title: VenHub Provides Update to Stockholders
feed.summary: VenHub Global, Inc. has issued an update to its stockholders addressing recent third-party publicity regarding its financial position. The company states that all financial information is drawn from its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K, which transparently disclosed its financial health and the need for additional capital. VenHub emphasizes its focus on executing its growth strategy, securing financing, and building long-term stockholder value, while encouraging reliance on its official SEC filings for accurate information.

feed.title: Western Asset Inflation Linked Income Fund To Go Ex-Dividend On July 24th, 2026 With 0.052 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Western Asset Inflation Linked Income Fund (NYSE:WIA) has announced that it will go ex-dividend on July 24th, 2026. The fund will pay a dividend of $0.052 per share to shareholders. This information is crucial for investors tracking dividend payouts.

feed.title: WHIRLPOOL CORPORATION RESCHEDULES SECOND-QUARTER EARNINGS RELEASE TO AUGUST 3RD AND CONFERENCE CALL TO AUGUST 4TH
feed.summary: Whirlpool Corporation has rescheduled its second-quarter financial results release to August 3, 2026, and its conference call to August 4, 2026. This adjustment was made because Chairman and CEO Marc Bitzer is recovering from a minor bicycle accident but is expected to return to the office by the new release date. The company provided details for participating in the conference call and accessing supporting materials.

feed.title: MSCI Inc (MSCI) Shares Fall 3.2% -- What GF Score of 95 Tells In
feed.summary: MSCI Inc (MSCI) shares recently decreased by 3.2%, with a 13.3% drop over the past week, yet the stock maintains a strong GF Score™ of 95/100, indicating robust overall performance. Despite concerns regarding its financial strength (4/10), MSCI is considered modestly undervalued with a GF Value™ estimate significantly higher than its current trading price, suggesting a potential entry point for long-term investors. Insider trading shows more sales than purchases over the last three months, which could signal mixed sentiment among insiders regarding short-term performance.

feed.title: Young Eagles Leadership Award Winner Announced At AirVenture
feed.summary: Patrick Cohenour, a Young Eagles coordinator for EAA Chapter 24 in Oklahoma City, has been awarded the 2026 Phillips 66 Aviation EAA Young Eagles Leadership Award at AirVenture. He is recognized for his dedication to inspiring youth in aviation, having introduced hundreds of children to flight and hands-on learning through aircraft projects. Cohenour expresses humility and gratitude for the award, emphasizing the importance of giving young people unforgettable experiences in aviation.

feed.title: INTU INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC Announces that Intuit Inc. Stockholders with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit!
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) and its officers. The lawsuit claims that Intuit made misleading statements about its growth and business model, particularly regarding its TurboTax revenue guidance, leading to investor losses. Intuit stockholders who suffered losses between August 22, 2025, and May 20, 2026, have an opportunity to lead the class action and are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: VIA INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC Reminds Investors of Via Transportation, Inc. to Contact the Firm Today!
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against Via Transportation, Inc. (NYSE:VIA) and its officers, alleging violations of federal securities laws during the company's September 12, 2025 IPO. The lawsuit claims that the Offering Documents were false and misleading, failing to disclose obstacles to Via's growth, including declining Platform Annual Run-Rate Revenue and inability to expand in Germany. Investors who purchased Via Transportation securities in connection with the IPO are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially join the case and request to be appointed as lead plaintiff by August 10, 2026.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating Blue Owl Capital Inc. (OWL) And Encourages Shareholders to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims against Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) for alleged corporate wrongdoing. The firm encourages shareholders who purchased Blue Owl securities before February 6, 2025, and still hold them, to contact them to assist with the investigation. The firm operates on a contingency fee basis, only seeking reimbursement if successful.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating Vital Farms, Inc. (VITL) And Encourages Shareholders to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims against Vital Farms, Inc. (VITL) for corporate wrongdoing. The firm encourages shareholders who purchased Vital Farms securities before May 8, 2025, and still hold them, to join the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC operates on a contingency fee basis, aiming to recover investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Is Investigating Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. (AQST) And Encourages Shareholders to Connect
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into Aquestive Therapeutics, Inc. (AQST) for potential corporate wrongdoing. The firm encourages shareholders who purchased Aquestive securities before June 16, 2025, and still hold them, to join the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC operates on a contingency fee basis, aiming to restore investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: FITB: Comerica Integration And Expense Control Will Support Balanced Medium Term Outlook
feed.summary: Analyst sentiment for Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) is cautiously optimistic following its Q2 earnings beat and progress on the Comerica integration. While bullish analysts highlight disciplined execution and potential revenue synergies, more cautious voices see 2026 as a transition year with ongoing integration challenges and potential interest rate pressures. The fair value estimate for FITB has risen to $62.75, reflecting increased confidence despite some adjustments to revenue growth and net profit margin assumptions.

feed.title: AESI: Power Buildout And Capacity Choices Will Drive Future Upside Potential
feed.summary: Atlas Energy Solutions' fair value has increased to $19.92, reflecting updated assumptions and recent price target shifts. Analyst opinions are split, with some bullish on power solutions growth and others cautious about sector positioning and capacity decisions. The company's expansion plans, including a 1.4 gigawatt power capacity agreement, are seen as key drivers for future upside, despite concerns about utilization and pricing amidst macroeconomic uncertainty.

feed.title: VRSK: Trough Reset And AI Concerns Set Stage For Repricing
feed.summary: Analysts have increased Verisk Analytics' fair value estimate to $225.06 per share, a 2.08% rise, due to optimism that recent growth weaknesses were transient, Q2 marked a trough, and AI disruption concerns are largely priced in. The latest research indicates a mixed sentiment, with some highlighting strong operational traction and reduced execution risk, while others remain cautious about growth durability and the stock's long-term profile despite recent upgrades. The company has also seen significant share repurchases, reaffirmed its 2026 guidance, and announced product developments, even as it faces removal from NASDAQ-100 and reclassification in other Russell growth benchmarks.

feed.title: Why Did CSX, UNP, NVCR Stocks Surge To 52-Week Highs Today?
feed.summary: CSX, Union Pacific (UNP), and Novocure (NVCR) stocks reached new 52-week highs following better-than-expected Q2 earnings reports. CSX benefited from strong rail demand and raised price targets from analysts like RBC Capital and JPMorgan. Union Pacific also saw broad improvements, with Goldman Sachs increasing its price target, while Novocure achieved a significant profit milestone with positive adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: Nvidia Partnership Gets Amkor Technology (AMKR) Stock Trending: Here's What You Should Know
feed.summary: Amkor Technology (AMKR) shares rose 12.20% after hours due to a new multi-year partnership with Nvidia (NVDA). This agreement involves Nvidia prepaying to expand Amkor's U.S. advanced packaging capacity in Arizona and aligning on long-term roadmaps for AI and accelerated computing technologies. Amkor is also set to report its Q2 2026 earnings soon, following a strong Q1 performance.

feed.title: XMHQ ETF Profile: Dividends, Returns (FWB:XMHQ)
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of the XMHQ ETF (BlackRock Global Funds SICAV - World Mining Fund Distribution -A4-) listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. It includes details such as its ISIN and other identifiers, and notes that its price performance and NAV total return data are currently unavailable. The article also highlights a significant decrease in recent dividend payouts for XMHQ.

feed.title: World Kinect (NYSE: WKC) lifts 2026 EPS outlook after record Q2 gross profit
feed.summary: World Kinect Corporation reported a significant improvement in profitability for Q2 2026, with record gross profit of $365.1 million and GAAP net income of $48.4 million, a stark contrast to a loss in the previous year. The company raised its full-year 2026 Adjusted EPS guidance to $3.20–$3.40 per share, reflecting stronger performance, particularly in its Aviation and Marine segments. Despite a decrease in consolidated sales volume and negative year-to-date operating cash flow, WKC returned capital to shareholders through a 15% dividend increase and share repurchases.

feed.title: VYNE Therapeutics Provides Update Regarding Cash Dividend, Reverse Stock Split and Anticipated Timing of Closing of the Proposed Merger with Yarrow Bioscience
feed.summary: VYNE Therapeutics provided an update on its special cash dividend, which was distributed on July 23, 2026, to stockholders of record as of July 22, 2026. The company's 1-for-50 reverse stock split is expected on July 24, 2026, with post-split trading beginning July 27, 2026. The closing of the proposed merger with Yarrow Bioscience, under Nasdaq's final review and approval, is now expected early in the week of July 27, 2026.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) grants director 2,380 stock options at $527.07
feed.summary: United Therapeutics Corp director Louis W. Sullivan was granted 2,380 stock options at an exercise price of $527.07 per share as part of an annual non-employee director award. These options vest on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Shareholders (anticipated June 25, 2027) and expire in July 2033. The filing also corrected a prior clerical error, updating his indirect holdings.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) awards 760 RSUs to board director Judy D. Olian
feed.summary: United Therapeutics (UTHR) director Judy D. Olian was awarded 760 restricted stock units (RSUs) as an annual non-employee director equity award on July 22, 2026. These RSUs will fully vest on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Shareholders, anticipated on June 25, 2027. Following this transaction, Olian directly holds 760 RSUs and 5,555 shares of common stock.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) awards RSUs and stock options to director Nilda Mesa
feed.summary: United Therapeutics (UTHR) director Nilda Mesa received annual non-employee director equity awards on July 22, 2026. These awards include 380 restricted stock units and 1,190 stock options, which are expected to vest on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Shareholders, anticipated for June 25, 2027. Following these awards, Mesa directly holds 5,678 shares of United Therapeutics common stock, and the stock options have an exercise price of $527.0700 and will expire on July 22, 2033.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) awards 2,380 stock options to board director
feed.summary: United Therapeutics (UTHR) awarded 2,380 stock options to board director Christopher Patusky on July 22, 2026. These options have an exercise price of $527.07 per share and expire on July 22, 2033. The award is part of the annual non-employee director compensation and vests on the earlier of one year from the grant date or the next Annual Meeting of Shareholders, anticipated to be June 25, 2027.
